scripts.d1:migrate:local: node -e "console.log('Local D1 is managed by the web package Alchemy app during: bun run dev. Optional manual wrangler d1 workflows need an explicit wrangler config.'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: node -e "console.log('Remote D1 migrations are applied by Alchemy when you deploy the web package: bun run deploy.'); process.exit(0)"
